name: Dark mode toggle switches the color scheme
description: The landing page has a theme toggle button. Clicking it switches the interface between light and dark color schemes.

planSteps.description: Click the theme toggle button (a moon or sun emoji icon) in the top-right corner of the page
Verify the interface switches to a dark color scheme (the page background becomes dark/near-black)
Click the theme toggle button again
Verify the interface switches back to a light color scheme (the page background becomes light)
